title: indulgent portuguese ground nut oil bake
description: savory, crumbly, indulgent portuguese dish featuring ground nut oil
instructions: combine the ground almonds, hazelnuts, and nut oil in a large mixing bowl.
add the flour and salt to the mixture, and mix until well combined.
with a spoon, add the water to the mixture, and stir until a crumbly dough forms.
if the dough is too dry, add more water, 1 tablespoon at a time.
if the dough is too wet, add more flour, 1 tablespoon at a time.
turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface, and knead for 5 minutes.
divide the dough into 6 equal pieces, and shape each piece into a ball.
place the balls onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each ball.
bake for 20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
